- 支持为当前订阅设置自动测试延迟间隔，输入 0 即可关闭
- 在更新订阅、调整覆写或系统唤醒后，自动测试延迟会按当前状态重新恢复，延迟结果与当前配置保持一致

<details>
<summary>English Version</summary>

- Add an auto delay test interval for the current subscription, with 0 used to disable it
- Restore auto delay tests after subscription updates, override changes, or system wake-up so latency results stay consistent with the current configuration

</details>
